archive_purpose: Public, checksum-addressed Hegemony Frontier Keep and Main Castle 3D source/runtime-reference deposit.

designation.name: Hegemony Frontier Keep and Main Castle
designation.status: descriptive archive label; no stricter canonical game name asserted
designation.role: castle/keep environment source and runtime-reference models

source.provenance: Ael supplied the named Blend, .blend1 backup, Frontier Keep GLB, and Main Castle GLB and explicitly authorized public deposit in Warpkeep-Assets.
source.private_workflow_metadata: intentionally omitted from the public archive

license_policy.covered_files: The named public package and archive metadata may be published and distributed as part of this repository and release.
license_policy.scope_note: No additional open-license grant is asserted. Repository or release presence does not license third-party tools, names, trademarks, canonical identity, or other Warpkeep material.

input_files.publication: sanitized derivative of supplied backup; original retained privately

inspection.visual_qa: Frontier Keep Blend and GLB rendered as the same coherent textured keep. Main Castle rendered as a distinct larger coherent textured castle; one initial generic-rig render was underlit and a scale-adjusted bright rig confirmed visible materials and geometry.

sanitization.observed_private_marker: Serialized Blender Shading screen file-browser directory was absolute; its value is intentionally omitted from public metadata.
sanitization.changed_scope: One Blender UI file-browser directory only.
sanitization.semantic_preservation: Source/public inspection records match for counts, bounds, objects, meshes, materials, images, armatures, actions, modifiers, text blocks, drivers, and missing-dependency records.
